title: Candy Necklace/Sweet Necklaces Pack of 10 - Individually Wrapped Candy Necklaces - Ideal Treat or Gift for Parties, Weddings or Christmas
features: 🍀 SIT DOWN AND ENJOY - A great sweet treats bag for you to enjoy. Kick back and relax and taste your way through these iconic retro sweets. Ideal for adults and children alike can be the perfect gift for any sweet lovers. Allows you to once again experience your favourite childhood memories and all the tasty sweets that came with it.
🌱 Vegetarians Friendly sweets! making it perfect for vegetarians and also they are Halal friendly
🎁 The Ideal Gift: Who doesn't love Candy Necklaces which makes them the perfect gift for Mother’s Day, Easter, Valentines, Father’s Day & of course Christmas
description: Product description 10 Idividually Wrapped Candy Necklaces Brighten Your Day with a Sweet Treat Meet your new favourite wearable trea, these colourful classics are sure to transport you back to the sweet memories of your childhood. Made in the UK, these candy beauties are delightfully nostalgic, yet tickle your taste buds with a taste that still holds up today. Whether you're treating yourself to a trip down memory lane or introducing the next generation to a classic, you can't put a price on the joy these necklaces bring. Refreshing Gift for Every Occasion Forget your ordinary, run-of-the-mill gifts and turn up with something bright, fun, and tasty. Our Candy Necklaces aren't just a treat to eat, they're a gift that keeps on giving. They're perfect for children's birthdays, Christmas presents, or even as a quirky wedding favour. Hygienically packed in individally wrapped packets, our Candy Necklaces always arrive fresh and ready to delight. Watch as faces light up and smiles abound, with a Candy Necklace, you're not just gifting sweets, you're gifting sweet memories. Ingredients May contain traces of cereals containing gluten > 20ppm, eggs, milk, nuts, peanuts, and soya. Dextrose, Glucose Syrup, Acid (Citric Acid), Flavouring, Colours (E129, E102, E133, E110), Anti-caking Agent (Magnesium Stearate). Warning: E129, E102 and E110 may have an adverse effect on activity and attention in children. Directions Open the individually wrapped packet before consuming. Sit down and enjoy the entire candy necklace at once. Be aware of potential allergens and the effect of certain colors on children's activity and attention.
